name: Thayer & Spring
address: 915 Silver Spring Ave, Silver Spring, MD 20910
approxRentRange: $2,510-$3,516 (2BR/2BA; some plans show balcony; townhome 2BR at ~$3,340)

notes.doorman: Brookfield property page and RentCafe both list '24/7 concierge service'; one review source noted high concierge turnover and occasional gaps at the desk, but the advertised service level is 24h
notes.balcony: Most 2BR floor plans on RentCafe are listed 'w/ Balcony'; at least one plan (2R) is not labeled as such
notes.inUnitLaundry: Brookfield page says 'select units'; RentCafe lists in-home washer/dryer as a standard in-unit amenity
notes.wellMaintained: Brookfield maintenance rating 3.5/5 (277 reviews); one search result noted elevator reliability complaints; insufficient resident review data to confirm or deny
notes.unitClimate: RentCafe amenity list explicitly states 'individual climate control'
notes.petFriendly: No weight limit; breed restrictions apply (Pit Bulls, Huskies, Rottweilers prohibited); two pets per apartment
